title: Flower Delivery 🌹 #flowerdelivery #rose #unhingedromance #funnycharacter #weirdcore #romancevibes #cringe #memevibes #tiktokhumor #creepycute #ai#livewallpaper
prompt_text: A hyper-realistic 3D animated character with exaggerated features, resembling a whimsical, lanky creature with a large bald head and a small tuft of brown hair. The character has wide, expressive brown eyes, a large toothy grin with a prominent front tooth, and is holding a bouquet of vibrant red roses. The background is a soft, out-of-focus natural setting with warm, golden-hour lighting that creates a gentle bokeh effect, emphasizing the character's joyful and romantic expression.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A hyper-realistic 3D animated character with exaggerated features, resembling a whimsical, lanky creature with a large bald head and a small tuft of brown hair. The character has wide, expressive brown eyes, a large toothy grin with a prominent front tooth, and is holding a bouquet of vibrant red roses. cinematography.cameraShot: Close-up, eye-level shot. The camera is static, focusing on the character's facial expressions and the roses.

actions: The character winks one eye playfully at the start.
The character brings the bouquet of red roses close to their face and takes a deep, appreciative sniff.
The character maintains a wide, joyful smile throughout the movement.
The character's eyes widen and sparkle as they react to the scent of the flowers.
The character gently sways their head while looking directly at the camera.
dialogue: A male voice sings: 'Oh, my love, my darling...'
[Soft, romantic acoustic music playing in the background]
